files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241) functions with LANGUAGE_TSX constant and typescript module query reuse
Added tsx extension mapping (lines 56-57) and tsx entry in supported_languages (lines 90-91) function

compile_belief_reason: All tsx arms follow the exact template from typescript arms, use correct tree_sitter_typescript::LANGUAGE_TSX constant, reuse typescript module queries (avoiding separate pub mod tsx), and are properly feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = \"lang-tsx\")] which aligns with test expectations in lang.rs and the existing pub mod declaration in mod.rs that covers both lang-typescript and lang-tsx features"
